message:
docs: Document ORDER BY with NULLs tests for future JIT support

Add documentation for SQL standard NULL ordering behavior tests.
These tests require JIT codegen NULL bitmap handling which is not
yet implemented. Includes:
- NULLS FIRST/LAST explicit ordering
- Default ASC (NULLS LAST) and DESC (NULLS FIRST)
- IS NULL / IS NOT NULL filters
- Float column with NULLs
